calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Marianne Dickson appeared via zoom for Pawnee Bruno (petitioner).

Ms. Dickson stated that decedents mother signed Durable Power of Attorney, that she is suffering from dementia and resides at Buena Vista, that she doesn't even remember the decedent anymore, that decedent was involved in a pending lawsuit with Uber, and that the settlement amount she was to receive will be around $100,000.00 after attorney fees and medical bills.

The Court waives the requirement of bond. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Continued To Aug-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
